reasoning: The Lean hypotheses `hcover` (every point lies in some B ∈ A) and `hrefine` (refinement property on pairwise intersections) are exactly Munkres' two axioms for "A is a basis for a topology on X". The local `is_topology` predicate captures the standard topology axioms (univ, binary intersection closure, arbitrary union closure; empty set follows from the union axiom applied to ∅). The LHS `{U | @IsOpen X (generateFrom A) U}` is the collection of open sets of Mathlib's `generateFrom A`, which is precisely the topology generated by A as a set of sets. The RHS `sInter {T | is_topology X T ∧ A ⊆ T}` is the intersection of all topologies on X containing A. The claimed set equality therefore exactly matches the informal statement. No hypothesis is silently added or dropped, and the conclusion is the asserted equality.
